description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a lush garden with a variety of trees and shrubs. The house features a brick facade with a prominent central entryway accessed by a set of steps, flanked by symmetrical windows. The roof is a simple gable style with a chimney visible on one side. The landscaping includes tall coniferous trees, flowering bushes, and manicured hedges, creating a private and inviting atmosphere. The property is enclosed by a low wall or fence, and there is a paved walkway leading to the front door. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with classic suburban charm.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable roof, surrounded by dense landscaping and a central entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entryway, steps, and a variety of trees and shrubs around the house.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical facade, central door, and dense foliage on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the house, additional trees, and the continuation of the garden.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with a clear look at the back entrance, windows, and surrounding tall trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a single door, and minimal overhang, flanked by shrubs and trees.
